summary: Color-graded video touring a CBP drug 'vault': a CBP officer walks a dim warehouse aisle stacked with boxes and gloved hands handle seized narcotics packages sealed with red evidence tape, with the CBP seal on a textured background at the start and end. The tweet includes a #Fallout reference. The clip is operational B-roll with no music, narration, or audio track.
notable_text: U.S. CUSTOMS AND BORDER PROTECTION / DEPARTMENT OF HOMELAND SECURITY (seal); CBP FEDERAL OFFICER (uniform)
